SUBJECT: The last last chance at SMARTS...


NAME,

Well, this is the email where I just try to cover my butt (if you pardon the expression)...

Here is the deal - at 2:00 pm eastern time, we're pulling SMARTS off the market.

After that deadline you won't be able to get into the SMARTS club at any price. So if you want in, you have to act now. Here's the link:

http:// sales page


I know if I don't send out one last email warning about this, then I am going to get some angry emails... people will be sending me "hate mail"
because they missed out on the program.

So this is your one last official warning. Act now, or miss out:

http:// sales page


best regards,
Andy Jenkins

P.S. One last thing... remember, this program is guaranteed. So even if you're not quite sure, the prudent thing would be to jump onboard.
Because you're not going to get another chance:

http:// sales page


P.P.S. We might re-release SMARTS at some time... but it will be at least four or five months from now. So only pass this up if you're willing to take your chances and wait until April or May.
